# Odoo Semantic MCP (OSM)

> Knowledge engine for Odoo: inheritance chains, view overrides, JS patches,
> field/method resolution across v8 to latest, exposed via MCP protocol for AI tools.

## Plugin: Odoo AI Agent Team

- Landing: https://odoo-semantic.viindoo.com/odoo-ai-agents
- 41 pre-built AI skills, 7 autonomous agents, 9 slash commands for Claude Code
- Every agent grounded on the OSM knowledge graph (12,400+ models, 184,000+ fields)
- Install: claude plugin marketplace add Viindoo/claude-plugins --scope user
           claude plugin install odoo-ai-agents@viindoo-plugins --scope user
- GitHub (MIT): https://github.com/Viindoo/odoo-mcp-client

## MCP Endpoint

- Server: https://odoo-semantic.viindoo.com/mcp
- Protocol: MCP over HTTP (Streamable HTTP transport)
- Auth: X-API-Key header (obtain a key after signup)

## Tools & Resources

- 31 MCP tools + 9 resources (https://odoo-semantic.viindoo.com/tools)
- Covers Odoo 8 to the latest version (recent releases actively maintained)
- Categories: model/field/method resolution, version lifecycle, quality/lint,
  superset discriminators, session state, CSS/SCSS stylesheet, ORM validation,
  automated-test surface (test classes, coverage, JS test suites)

## Pricing & Install

- Pricing: https://odoo-semantic.viindoo.com/pricing
  Free tier: 30 queries/day, no credit card. Paid from $19/month.
- Install guide: https://odoo-semantic.viindoo.com/install/
- Accuracy benchmark: 95% vs 43% on 40 real Odoo tasks
  (Claude claude-sonnet-4-5, tested 2026-05)

## Source & Community

- Plugin (MIT): https://github.com/Viindoo/odoo-mcp-client
- Viindoo: https://viindoo.com

## Key capabilities for AI agents

- Resolve any Odoo model's full field/method/view tree (cross-repo, cross-version, v8 to latest)
- Trace XPath override chains and OWL JS component patches
- Validate @api.depends paths, domain operators, relation comodels before suggesting code
- Impact analysis: every model/method/view/report affected by a field change
- Module architecture: manifest, dependencies, model inventory
- CSS/SCSS stylesheet indexing: variable definitions, import chains, mixin resolution
- Session-sticky odoo_version + profile_name (24h TTL)
